TextView.android:text: Please review the terms and complete the CAPTCHA to continue.

By creating an account with Maestro Autoworks, you agree to provide accurate vehicle and identity information, present valid documents upon request, and abide by our appointment and cancellation policies. Falsified details may result in account suspension.

CheckBox.android:text: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service

TextView.android:text: A valid driver's license is required to book services.
Maestro Autoworks requires a valid driver’s license to book services. This helps us verify your identity and ensure the safety of all our customers.
Do you have a valid driver’s license?

RadioButton.android:text: ✔ Yes, I have a valid driver’s license

TextView.android:text:
Your driver’s license will be required in the next steps. Please have it ready — you will need to:

 • Enter your license number and expiry date
 • Take a clear photo of your license for verification

Make sure your license is physically on hand before continuing.

A valid driver’s license is required to register with Maestro Autoworks.\n\nPlease obtain your driver’s license from the Land Transportation Office (LTO) first, then return to complete your registration.
Tell us a bit about yourself.
Enter your license, vehicle info, and upload documents.
Issuance date must be today or in the past
Expiry date must be in the future
Please select at least one DL code

CheckBox.android:text: I also have a Conductor’s License

TextView.android:text: Issuance date must be today or in the past
Expiry date must be in the future

TextView.android:contentDescription: Where to find MV file number

TextView.android:text: Exactly 15 digits — beside "MV File No." on your OR or CR.
Tap a card to select a photo from your gallery. Ensure documents are clear and fully visible.
All 3 documents uploaded. You’re ready to continue.
Take a clear photo of your driver’s license front. Our system will cross-check the number you entered.
Please review your information before setting your password.
Your registration details have been successfully submitted and verified. One last step — set a secure password for your account.
Set your password on the next screen.
An admin will review and verify your license before your first booking.
Once approved, you can start booking services right away.
Choose a strong password to protect your account.
Already have an account? Sign In
Your account has been created. You can now sign in with your credentials.
Note: An admin will manually verify your license before your first booking.
